display.purpose: Space Grotesk 700. Selected-equipment name, KPI counts, wordmark.

headline.purpose: Space Grotesk 600. Card names, panel titles.

body.purpose: Inter 400. Alert messages, prose, empty states.

label.purpose: Inter 500, tracked uppercase. Sensor legends, eyebrows, status.

mono.purpose: JetBrains Mono. All telemetry values, IDs, timestamps.

shadows.name: status-glow-sm
shadows.purpose: Halo on the active RUL arc, in the status color. Makes live data read as lit.

shadows.name: status-glow-md
shadows.purpose: Glow under the equipment-health bar, in the status color.

shadows.name: tooltip-lift
shadows.purpose: The one true shadow — chart tooltips floating above the plane.

motion.name: pulse-critical
motion.purpose: Slow breathe on critical pills only. Gated behind prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: transition-state
motion.purpose: Default for card hover/selection state changes.

motion.name: transition-bar
motion.purpose: Equipment-health bar settling as RUL updates.

components.name: Equipment Card
components.description: Primary interactive surface — a status-tinted button holding the RUL gauge and sensor pills.
components.css: .ds-equip-card { display:block; width:100%; text-align:left; background:#111827; border:1px solid rgba(0,212,170,0.2); border-radius:12px; padding:16px; transition:border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-equip-card:hover { border-color:rgba(0,212,170,0.4); } .ds-equip-card:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(0,212,170,0.4); } .ds-equip-head { display:flex; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:space-between; } .ds-equip-id { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#9CA3AF; margin:0; } .ds-equip-name { font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:14px; color:#F9FAFB; margin:2px 0 0; } .ds-equip-icon { width:16px; height:16px; color:#00D4AA; }

components.name: RUL Gauge
components.description: Signature 220-degree degradation arc: teal healthy, sweeping to amber then red as remaining useful life falls.
components.html: <svg class="ds-rul" width="120" height="120" viewBox="0 0 120 120"><path d="M 16.7 79.5 A 45.6 45.6 0 1 1 103.3 79.5" fill="none" stroke="#1F2937" stroke-width="8.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M 16.7 79.5 A 45.6 45.6 0 0 1 13.6 39.9" fill="none" stroke="#00D4AA" stroke-width="8.4" stroke-linecap="round" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(0,212,170,0.53))"/><text x="60" y="56" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" fill="#00D4AA" font-size="21.6" font-family="'Space Grotesk',sans-serif" font-weight="700">87</text><text x="60" y="77" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9CA3AF" font-size="10.8" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" letter-spacing="0.08em">CYCLES</text></svg>

components.name: Sensor Tile
components.description: Inset tile showing one sensor's live mono value and unit.
components.css: .ds-sensor { background:#1F2937; border-radius:8px; padding:6px 8px; } .ds-sensor-label { font-family:Inter,sans-serif; font-size:9px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; color:#9CA3AF; margin:0; } .ds-sensor-val { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; font-weight:500; color:#F9FAFB; margin:2px 0 0; } .ds-sensor-unit { color:#9CA3AF; font-size:9px; margin-left:2px; }

components.name: Status Pill (Live)
components.description: Fully rounded connection/status pill with leading icon.
components.html: Live
components.css: .ds-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:9999px; background:rgba(0,212,170,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(0,212,170,0.3); color:#00D4AA; font-family:Inter,sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:500; } .ds-pill svg { width:12px; height:12px; }

components.name: Alert Item
components.description: Severity-tinted alert row in the feed, icon plus equipment and message.
components.html:
Fluid Bed Dryer

Vibration trending above nominal band

12s ago
components.css: .ds-alert { display:flex; gap:10px; padding:10px; border-radius:8px; background:rgba(245,158,11,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.3); } .ds-alert svg { width:14px; height:14px; color:#F59E0B; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:2px; } .ds-alert-eq { font-family:Inter,sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:500; color:#F59E0B; margin:0; } .ds-alert-msg { font-family:Inter,sans-serif; font-size:11px; color:#9CA3AF; margin:2px 0 0; } .ds-alert-time { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; color:#9CA3AF; margin:4px 0 0; }

narrative.overview: PharmaGuard is the screen on a precision lab instrument, not a SaaS dashboard. A near-black navy canvas recedes so illuminated data is the only thing that draws the eye. Teal is the single resting accent meaning healthy and live; the system stays quiet by default and only escalates through amber, red, and a slow critical pulse when a unit actually degrades. The signature element is the RUL degradation arc, an instrument readout, never a fitness ring or a percentage bar.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black navy canvas; data is the only light source.
One resting accent (teal); color escalates only with real severity.
Monospace for all numbers — telemetry reads as instrument output.
The RUL degradation arc is the signature, non-negotiable component.
Motion is reserved for meaning (the critical pulse), never ambient.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Teal is the only resting color. If a screen under normal operation shows amber or red, that's a signal, not styling. Status escalates teal -> amber -> red and never skips or decorates.

rules.name: The Lit-Data Rule
rules.body: Color belongs to data, not chrome. Borders, backgrounds, and structure stay neutral navy; saturation is spent only on values, statuses, and the RUL arc.

rules.name: The Numbers-Are-Mono Rule
rules.body: Any value the model produces or the stream reports is set in JetBrains Mono. Prose is Inter, headings are Space Grotesk, data is mono.

rules.name: The Tonal-Layering Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are distinguished by tone, not shadow. One level deeper means one step lighter (#0A0E1A -> #111827 -> #1F2937). Glows are for data, shadows for true overlays only.

dos: Do keep the canvas #0A0E1A and let illuminated data be the only light source.
Do set every telemetry value in JetBrains Mono (IDs, sensor readings, %, timestamps, cycles).
Do reserve teal for resting/healthy state and escalate teal -> amber -> red only on real severity.
Do convey depth by tonal layering and use colored glows, not drop shadows, to make active data feel lit.
Do keep the RUL degradation arc as the signature readout, color-stepped and glowing.
Do hold body and label text to #9CA3AF or lighter so it clears AA, and pair every status color with an icon or label.
Do gate the critical pulse and spinners behind prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS dashboard — no templated card grids, no rounded blue primary buttons, no hero-metric stat tiles.
Don't drift toward the consumer fitness/IoT app — no playful gradients, no emoji, no gamified rings.
Don't look like enterprise SCADA / industrial HMI clutter — no gray gradients, no beveled skeuomorphic gauges.
Don't become a crypto/trading terminal — no neon-on-black hyperactivity, no blinking, no ambient motion.
Don't use #6B7280 for small body or label text on the navy field — it fails WCAG AA. Use #9CA3AF or lighter.
Don't use purple/violet (#A78BFA) anywhere — chart and accent colors come from teal / amber / red / cyan only.
Don't add background-clip:text gradients, glassmorphism as decoration, or border-left accent stripes.
